title: [HISTORICAL] Core Refactoring (v0.6.0)
description:
## Summary
Core refactoring work for v0.6.0 release including nilearn integration, deprecation stubs, and method updates.

## Key Achievements
- Deleted deprecated Priority 3 files (brain_collection, model specs)
- Added deprecation stubs for removed methods (predict, ttest, randomise, predict_multi)
- Integrated nilearn for .regress() functionality (7 tests)
- Added .compute_contrasts() method (3 tests)
- Refactored .extract_roi() to use NiftiLabelsMasker
- Updated .smooth() and .empty() to return copies
- Maintained HDF5 backward compatibility

## Key Commits
- fb256c8 Fix compute_contrasts() to work with new .fit() API
- b514a8a Remove regress() method in v0.6.0 breaking release
- 6ce243b Optimize BrainData methods: replace deepcopy with shallow copy
- c2a0929 test: Add filter() and compute_contrasts() tests
- ce3662d fix: Complete Round 1 audit fixes - 4 critical bugs resolved

## Reference
- claude-research/refactor.md (original goals)
- claude-research/refactor-todos.md (Priority 1 section)
close_reason: Completed as part of v0.6.0 development - historical record

title: [HISTORICAL] Polars DesignMatrix Migration (v0.6.0)
description:
## Summary
Complete migration of DesignMatrix from pandas to Polars with native resampling capabilities.

## Key Achievements
- Phase 1: Construction and basic operations
- Phase 2: Statistical operations
- Phase 3: HRF convolution
- Phase 4 & 5: Polynomials and append
- Phase 6: Diagnostics (VIF and clean)
- Phase 7: Utilities
- GLM integration working (nilearn boundary conversion)
- file_reader integration
- Adjacency.regress() integration
- Polars-native downsample() and upsample()
- 71 passing tests total
- 2-5× performance improvement

## Key Commits
- f997a2b feat(polars): Implement DesignMatrix Phase 1 - Construction and basic operations
- 218d240 feat(polars): Implement DesignMatrix Phase 2 - Statistical operations
- 3760fc2 feat(polars): Implement DesignMatrix Phase 3 - HRF convolution
- 501d6bf feat(polars): Implement DesignMatrix Phase 4 & Phase 5a/5b
- e33bfe9 feat(polars): Implement DesignMatrix Phase 6 - Diagnostics
- 4cec3a9 feat(polars): Complete DesignMatrix Polars migration - Phase 7
- b5e2804 feat(polars): Complete DesignMatrix Polars migration with GLM integration
- a7920cf feat(polars): Complete Polars DesignMatrix integration - fix Adjacency.regress()
- bbac3f8 refactor(polars): Complete Polars optimization with native resampling

## Reference
- claude-research/polars-migration-v3-tdd.md
- claude-research/polars-refactoring-summary.md
- claude-research/refactor-todos.md (Priority 2.13 section)

title: [HISTORICAL] Stats Migration to Inference (v0.6.0)
description:
## Summary
Complete migration of stats.py functions to the GPU-accelerated inference module.

## Key Achievements
- Phase 1: Code deduplication (_calc_pvalue → _compute_pvalue)
- Phase 2: Deprecation & removal (correlation, _permute_sign, regress, etc.)
- Phase 3: Matrix utilities to inference/matrix.py (double_center, u_center, distance_correlation)
- isc() wrapper migration with return key mapping fix
- isc_group() wrapper migration with return key mapping fix
- isfc() migration with _compute_cross_correlation()
- CPU parallelization (n_jobs=-1 default)
- Phase 5: Usage verification (threshold, multi_threshold, summarize_bootstrap)
- 9 statistical correctness tests

## Key Commits
- 4670656 finish refactoring stats and replace pandas with polars/numpy ops
- bd47967 improve isc group
- 1a2dd5f standardize inference
- 433e462 add isc and matrix correctness tests
- 3d1b7fc refactor inference tests and add two sample statistical correctness tests
- ebdd51a optimize icc, improve memory management, refactor inference module

## Reference
- claude-research/archive/v0.6.0-plans/STATS_TODO_ACTION_PLAN.md
- claude-research/archive/v0.6.0-plans/MIGRATION_PLAN_STATS_TO_INFERENCE.md
- claude-research/stats-phase5-verification.md

title: Handle NaN values in Adjacency.similarity() (#432)
description: Adjacency.similarity() does not handle NaN values gracefully. Should add nan-aware correlation or option to mask NaNs. GitHub: #432

title: Use nearest interpolation for atlas/label resampling (#446)
description: Brain_Data uses interpolation='continuous' which creates invalid intermediate values when resampling discrete atlases. Should detect integer data and use nearest-neighbor. GitHub: #446

title: Add header-only read functions (#452)
description: Add functions to get nifti/hdf5 headers without loading full files. Enhancement for faster metadata inspection. GitHub: #452

title: Implement matrix permutation (Mantel test)
description: GPU-accelerated Mantel test for matrix comparisons. Commit: 7c0de71. Tests: 25

title: Review test deselection (710 tests)
description:
## Summary
Review and document the ~710 deselected tests in the test suite.

## Current Status
- Tier1: 309 tests collected, ~36s runtime
- Deselected: ~645 tests (mostly tier2 GPU benchmarks)
- All tier1 tests passing

## Tasks
1. Categorize deselected tests:
   - Intentional tier2 GPU tests (expected)
   - Tests requiring specific hardware
   - Tests with unmet dependencies
   - Tests that should be tier1

2. Document reasons for exclusion
3. Fix any tests that should be running
4. Update test markers if needed

## Target
≤10 unexplained deselected tests for release (excluding intentional tier2 GPU tests)

## Estimate
1-2 hours

## Reference
- plans/v0.6.0-VERIFICATION.md (Test Suite section)

title: [HISTORICAL] Bootstrap Refactoring (v0.6.0)
description:
## Summary
Complete bootstrap refactoring with OnlineBootstrapStats infrastructure and GPU-accelerated model bootstrapping.

## Key Achievements
- Phase 1: OnlineBootstrapStats infrastructure
- Phase 2: CPU-parallel simple aggregation (40 tests)
- Phase 3: Ridge model weights bootstrap with 10-100× speedup
- Phase 4: Ridge predict bootstrap
- Phase 5: BrainData.bootstrap() integration
- Phase 6: Removed Adjacency.isc() and Adjacency.isc_group() methods
- Memory-efficient online statistics
- Support for stat='mean', 'std', 'ci', 'predict'

## Key Commits
- 1e8e67b Phase 1: Implement OnlineBootstrapStats infrastructure for bootstrap refactor
- bd1b1f0 Phase 2: Implement CPU-parallel bootstrap for simple aggregation methods
- a6884fb Phase 3: Implement Ridge model weights bootstrap with 10-100× speedup
- 3bb24c5 Phase 4: Implement Ridge predict bootstrap + himalaya GPU research
- 1494a8e Phase 6: Implement robust error handling and validation
- bedcc46 Phase 7: Implement performance validation tests (tier2)
- 8729a4b remove adjacency isc methods

## Reference

title: Fix test warnings and compatibility issues
description:
## Summary
Fix warnings that appear during test runs for cleaner output and better compatibility.

## Priority 1 (Breaking Issues)
- Fix int64→int32 conversions (brain_data.py:1599, 2272)
  - Nilearn warns about 64-bit integers incompatible with FSL/SPM
  - Change: `ma.data = np.round(ma.data).astype(np.int32)`

## Priority 2 (Future Compatibility)
- Add nilearn 0.12 compatibility layer
  - Warning: "3D images will be transformed to 1D arrays"
  - Add version detection and handle both cases
  - Most common warning (~80+ occurrences)

## Priority 3 (Quality of Life)
- Suppress PyTables performance warnings (utils.py:44)
  - Use `warnings.catch_warnings()` context manager
- Fix sklearn numerical stability warnings
  - Add robust scaling for data with extreme values

## Estimate
2-3 hours

## Reference
- claude-research/warning_analysis.md
- plans/v0.6.0-VERIFICATION.md (Warning Fixes section)

title: Fix Brain_Data squeeze flattening multi-file loading (#449)
description: When loading multiple files via Brain_Data(file_list), the squeeze() call on lines 138-139 can collapse a (1, n_voxels) array to 1D. User reports multi-subject structure not preserved. GitHub: #449

description: Integration with nilearn GLM boundary and file_reader. Commits: b5e2804, d518b6e, a7920cf

title: Achieve perfect cross-backend determinism
description: 0.000% variance between numpy/torch/cuda backends. Commits: 55716d2, e2e47f5

title: Update migration guide and documentation
description:
## Summary
Update documentation for v0.6.0 release with migration guide and breaking changes.

## Tasks
1. Migration guide updates:
   - Stats.py → inference migration examples
   - Fit dataclass usage examples
   - BrainData.fit() inplace parameter
   - DesignMatrix Polars changes
   - Bootstrap changes

2. Breaking changes summary table:
   - stats.py function removals (regress, correlation, etc.)
   - DesignMatrix pandas → Polars
   - BrainData attribute changes
   - Deprecated method warnings
   - Import path changes

3. API documentation:
   - Verify class method signatures
   - Add new parameter descriptions

4. Examples:
   - Quick start with inference module
   - GPU acceleration example
   - Fit dataclass serialization

## Estimate
4-6 hours

## Reference
- plans/v0.6.0-VERIFICATION.md (Documentation section)

title: [HISTORICAL] BrainData.fit() Dataclass Integration (v0.6.0)
description:
## Summary
Integration of Fit dataclass with BrainData.fit() method supporting both inplace and return modes.

## Key Achievements
- Added inplace=True kwarg (default for backward compat)
- Implemented inplace=False → returns Fit dataclass
- Updated Ridge model score() for per-voxel R² scores
- Added _to_fit_dataclass() helper method
- Preserved backward compatibility
- 11 tests total including:
  - Backward compatibility (inplace=True)
  - Ridge without CV (inplace=False)
  - Ridge with CV (inplace=False)
  - GLM (inplace=False)
  - Predict after inplace=False
  - Serialization roundtrip

## Key Commits
- aa5d5df Add Fit dataclass for immutable model fitting results
- 42743d1 fix brain-data fit progress bar

## Reference
- plans/v0.6.0-SUMMARY.md (BrainData.fit() Integration section)
- plans/v0.6.0-VERIFICATION.md (BrainData.fit() Integration checklist)

title: Tutorial Overhaul (v0.6.0)
description: Complete tutorial overhaul with new API examples. Critical for v0.6.0 release.

title: v0.7.0 Performance Enhancements
description:
## Summary
Major performance enhancements and architectural improvements for v0.7.0.

## Planned Features

### PyArrow Integration
- Add pyarrow as optional dependency
- Update _to_pandas() with pyarrow path
- 10-100× faster Polars↔pandas conversions
- Affects downsample, upsample, heatmap

### Polars GPU Engine
- Research current GPU integration patterns
- Design GPU backend selection
- Add GPU path for convolution (cupy.convolve)
- Test GPU correctness vs CPU

### FastSRM Implementation
- Research FastSRM algorithm
- Implement for large-scale analyses

### BrainCollection Class
- Design for managing multiple BrainData objects
- Efficient batch operations
- Memory management

### Storage Migration
- HDF5 → Parquet for DataFrames
- Polars lazy evaluation by default

## Reference
- claude-research/refactor-todos.md (Priority 4 section)
- claude-research/polars-migration-finalization-plan.md

description:

- Implemented cv='auto' for alpha selection (3 tests)
- Added cv=sklearn_splitter support (1 test)

title: [HISTORICAL] GPU-Accelerated Inference Module (v0.6.0)
description:
## Summary
Complete GPU-accelerated inference module with 8 statistical testing modules achieving 10-100× speedup.

## Key Achievements
- Module restructuring (inference.py → inference/ package)
- one_sample permutation test (10 tests)
- two_sample permutation test (17 tests)
- correlation permutation (Pearson, Spearman, Kendall) (16 tests)
- timeseries correlation (circle_shift, phase_randomize) (25+ tests)
- matrix permutation/Mantel test (25 tests)
- ISC module (24 tier1 + 9 tier2 tests)
- Deterministic RNG pattern
- Perfect cross-backend determinism (0.000% variance)
- DESIGN.md comprehensive documentation
- 170 tests total
- 10-100× GPU speedup, 4-8× CPU-parallel speedup

## Key Commits
- 6492d51 feat: GPU-accelerated inference module with clean architecture
- 79d48bb feat(inference): Add GPU-accelerated correlation permutation test module
- 921be5a feat(inference): Add Spearman and Kendall correlation metrics
- 55716d2 fix(inference): Achieve perfect backward compatibility via deterministic RNG pattern
- e2e47f5 fix(inference): Achieve perfect cross-backend determinism for all permutation tests
- 4a7486d fix statistical correctness of inference module
- 7c0de71 feat(inference): Add matrix permutation test (Mantel test) module
- 4f7c809 feat(inference): Add GPU-accelerated Intersubject Correlation (ISC) module
- bcb0af6 docs: Complete documentation update for GPU-accelerated inference module

## Reference
- claude-research/2025-10-30-inference-tdd-plan.md
- claude-research/inference-correctness-analysis.md
- nltools/algorithms/inference/DESIGN.md
- claude-research/refactor-todos.md (Priority 2.14 section)
